title: Chipmakers drive second wave of global AI boom
description: Nvidia isn’t the only artificial intelligence winner as rival chip stocks jump in a broader rally that depends on Big Tech’s appetite for hardware continuing
content:
Global equity markets remain on a seemingly unstoppable upward trajectory, fuelled by enthusiasm for artificial intelligence.

title: AI boom helps erase California’s multibillion-dollar budget deficit
description: Gov. Gavin Newsom on Thursday released an updated budget plan that shows California has erased its projected deficit for the next two years, thanks to billions of dollars in additional tax revenue tied to Silicon Valley’s artificial intelligence boom.

title: A universal basic income won’t solve the AI unemployment problem-here’s what will
description: Artificial intelligence leaders like OpenAI’s Sam Altman have waxed eloquent about a universal basic income (UBI) as the answer to AI-caused mass unemployment. Policymakers shouldn’t fall for it. Here’s why
content:
But would it be enough?
